title: Contact us - Glastonbury and Somerton Liberal Democrats
text_excerpt: Contact us - Glastonbury and Somerton Liberal Democrats Skip to main content Glastonbury and Somerton Liberal Democrats Sign up! What's on in Glastonbury and Somerton? Volunteer Campaigns Meet Sarah Dyke News Contact us Donate Join Donate Join Volunteer Join the Liberal Democrats Campaigns Sarah’s Household Waste Recycling Centres Petition Save the River Brue Stop Lloyd's Bank from closing Business Rates Relief Petition Sarah's Dentistry petition Sarah's health survey Sarah's Rural Connectivity Survey Resident's survey Somerton and Langport train station Local GP Crisis Stop Sewage Dumping Contact Sarah ✉️ 9 Woodside Court, Sparkford, BA22 7LH 💻 sarah@sarahdyke.uk 📱twitter.com/SarahDykeLD 🖥️ facebook.com/Sarahdykesomerset The Liberal Democrats will use your contact details to send you information on the topics you have requested. Any data we gather will be used in accordance with our privacy policy at www.libdems.org.uk/privacy . To exercise your legal data rights, email: data.protection@libdems.org.uk . We take accessibility and your data privacy seriously. Read our accessibility statement and cookie policy . Promoted by the Liberal Democrats , First Floor, 66 Buckingham Gate, London SW1E 6AU. Website by Prater Raines . This website uses cookies Please select the types of cookies you want to allow. Essential These are necessary for the website to function properly. Analytics These help us to understand how our visitors use our website. Marketing These allow us to display content from other websites that track you for advertising purposes.
